metadata.description: Orchestrates 8 specialist agents across 4 iterations to take any UI file from functional to production-grade. Covers visual hierarchy, typography, layout, accessibility, motion, resilience, and polish.

plugins.name: compound-design-loop
plugins.description: Build fast, then refine through specialized lenses. Spawns 8 parallel specialist agents across 4 structured iterations (DIAGNOSE, FOUNDATIONS, ENHANCE, SHIP) to review and auto-fix any UI file.
